elevenlabs.header: Connect Twitchat with {LINK} and use it to read messages with realistic voices
elevenlabs.instructions: You need to create an account on ElevenLabs and request an API Key
elevenlabs.usage: You can now use ElevenLabs to read messages on the {TTS} section or read anything you want from the {TRIGGERS} thanks to the ElevenLabs action.

errors.CANNOT_LIST_VOICES: Cannot retrieve the list of voices
errors.CANNOT_LIST_MODELS: Cannot retrieve the list of models
errors.NO_TTS_ACCESS: Grant "Text to Speech" access in your ElevenLabs API key settings.
errors.PAYMENT_REQUIRED: You must provide payment information in your ElevenLabs account.

elevenlabs.error_resolution: You must grant read access to {SOURCE} in your ElevenLabs API Key settings.
